Your yard.

Greenprints are the easy button for converting any American yard to climate-resilient, water-smart, pollinator-friendly native plants.

Powered by Claude AI, fortified and shaped by human intelligence and expertise.

A note on AI's footprint: a single Greenprint uses roughly the energy and water of a couple Google searches — small on its own. That's a real, valid concern at data-center scale, and we take it seriously.

40M+ acres of US lawns and yards
60–80% water reduction possible
50 states native plant coverage

This is the Greenprint demo

Greenprint is one tool in SmartScape, the full AI-powered native landscaping platform. Funded development will add:

Google Satellite view integration — AI maps your actual yard geometry for a precise planting layout
Real-time nursery inventory — see exactly which plants are in stock near you today
Downloadable PDF Greenprint — your full plan in a beautiful, shareable document
OSU Extension & USDA live data — plans continuously updated with latest climate-adaptive plant research
Seasonal maintenance subscription — quarterly guidance to keep your Climate Retrofit thriving
AI plant recommendations are generated by Claude AI, whose training incorporates the USDA PLANTS Database, iNaturalist, university extension research, and peer-reviewed botanical literature. Recommendations are for informational purposes only. Your local nursery can confirm availability and answer any site-specific questions. Nursery data compiled from PlantNative.org, Calscape, Pollinator Pathway NW, Native Plants Hawaii, and regional conservation districts. All nurseries listed specialize in or carry native plants for their region. A note on AI's footprint: a single Greenprint uses roughly the energy and water of a couple Google searches — small on its own. AI's aggregate water and energy use at data-center scale is a real, valid concern. Greenprint Generator runs on Claude, combined with real native-plant expertise built into the tool, and every yard it helps convert to natives can cut water use 60-80%, reduce pesticide/fertilizer runoff, and create pollinator habitat. SmartScape prototype — May 2026.
SmartScape · Greenprints · Powered by Claude AI, directed by SmartScape's human expertise
